import { Routes, Route, Navigate } from 'react-router-dom'
import { AppLayout } from '@/layouts'
import { LoginPage, RegisterPage, ForgotPasswordPage, NotFoundPage } from '@/pages/auth'
import { DashboardPage } from '@/pages/dashboard/DashboardPage'
import { LearningPage } from '@/pages/learning/LearningPage'
import { AnalyticsPage } from '@/pages/analytics/AnalyticsPage'
import { ResourcesPage } from '@/pages/resources/ResourcesPage'
import { SettingsPage } from '@/pages/settings/SettingsPage'
import { ProtectedRoute } from './ProtectedRoute'
import { ROUTES } from '@/constants'

export function AppRoutes() {
  return (
    <Routes>
      {/* Public routes */}
      <Route path={ROUTES.LOGIN} element={<LoginPage />} />
      <Route path={ROUTES.REGISTER} element={<RegisterPage />} />
      <Route path={ROUTES.FORGOT_PASSWORD} element={<ForgotPasswordPage />} />

      {/* Protected routes */}
      <Route
        element={
          <ProtectedRoute>
            <AppLayout />
          </ProtectedRoute>
        }
      >
        <Route path={ROUTES.DASHBOARD} element={<DashboardPage />} />
        <Route path={ROUTES.LEARNING} element={<LearningPage />} />
        <Route path={ROUTES.ANALYTICS} element={<AnalyticsPage />} />
        <Route path={ROUTES.RESOURCES} element={<ResourcesPage />} />
        <Route path={ROUTES.SETTINGS} element={<SettingsPage />} />
      </Route>

      {/* 404 */}
      <Route path="/404" element={<NotFoundPage />} />
      <Route path="*" element={<Navigate to="/404" replace />} />
    </Routes>
  )
}

export { AppRoutes } from './AppRoutes'
export { ProtectedRoute } from './ProtectedRoute'

import { StrictMode } from 'react'
import { createRoot } from 'react-dom/client'
import { BrowserRouter } from 'react-router-dom'
import { QueryClientProvider } from '@tanstack/react-query'
import { AuthProvider } from '@/contexts/AuthContext'
import { ToastProvider } from '@/components/ui'
import { queryClient } from '@/services/queryClient'
import { AppRoutes } from '@/routes'
import './index.css'

createRoot(document.getElementById('root')!).render(
  <StrictMode>
    <BrowserRouter>
      <QueryClientProvider client={queryClient}>
        <AuthProvider>
          <ToastProvider>
            <AppRoutes />
          </ToastProvider>
        </AuthProvider>
      </QueryClientProvider>
    </BrowserRouter>
  </StrictMode>,
)

+import { Navigate, useLocation } from 'react-router-dom'
+import { useAuth } from '@/contexts/AuthContext'
+import { LoadingState } from '@/components/ui'
+import { ROUTES } from '@/constants'
+
+export function ProtectedRoute({ children }: { children: React.ReactNode }) {
+  const { isAuthenticated, isLoading } = useAuth()
+  const location = useLocation()
+
+  if (isLoading) {
+    return <LoadingState message="Checking authentication..." />
+  }
+
+  if (!isAuthenticated) {
+    return <Navigate to={ROUTES.LOGIN} state={{ from: location }} replace />
+  }
+
+  return <>{children}</>
+}

+import { Routes, Route, Navigate } from 'react-router-dom'
+import { AppLayout } from '@/layouts'
+import { LoginPage, RegisterPage, ForgotPasswordPage, NotFoundPage } from '@/pages/auth'
+import { DashboardPage } from '@/pages/dashboard/DashboardPage'
+import { LearningPage } from '@/pages/learning/LearningPage'
+import { AnalyticsPage } from '@/pages/analytics/AnalyticsPage'
+import { ResourcesPage } from '@/pages/resources/ResourcesPage'
+import { SettingsPage } from '@/pages/settings/SettingsPage'
+import { ProtectedRoute } from './ProtectedRoute'
+import { ROUTES } from '@/constants'
+
+export function AppRoutes() {
+  return (
+    <Routes>
+      {/* Public routes */}
+      <Route path={ROUTES.LOGIN} element={<LoginPage />} />
+      <Route path={ROUTES.REGISTER} element={<RegisterPage />} />
+      <Route path={ROUTES.FORGOT_PASSWORD} element={<ForgotPasswordPage />} />
+
+      {/* Protected routes */}
+      <Route
+        element={
+          <ProtectedRoute>
+            <AppLayout />
+          </ProtectedRoute>
+        }
+      >
+        <Route path={ROUTES.DASHBOARD} element={<DashboardPage />} />
+        <Route path={ROUTES.LEARNING} element={<LearningPage />} />
+        <Route path={ROUTES.ANALYTICS} element={<AnalyticsPage />} />
+        <Route path={ROUTES.RESOURCES} element={<ResourcesPage />} />
+        <Route path={ROUTES.SETTINGS} element={<SettingsPage />} />
+      </Route>
+
+      {/* 404 */}
+      <Route path="/404" element={<NotFoundPage />} />
+      <Route path="*" element={<Navigate to="/404" replace />} />
+    </Routes>
+  )
+}

All files have been written successfully. Here's the structured report:

### SUMMARY
Created all 15 files for the AAA-v2 frontend project. This includes the `useAuthForm` hook, four auth pages (Login, Register, ForgotPassword, NotFound) with a barrel `index.ts`, placeholder pages for Dashboard, Learning, Analytics, Resources, and Settings, a `ProtectedRoute` guard, the `AppRoutes` router configuration, a routes barrel `index.ts`, and an updated `main.tsx` entry point that wraps the app with BrowserRouter, QueryClientProvider, AuthProvider, ToastProvider, and AppRoutes. All files were written in the correct directory structure under `frontend/src/`.

### EVIDENCE
- `frontend/src/hooks/useAuthForm.ts` — written (970 bytes)
- `frontend/src/pages/auth/LoginPage.tsx` — written (6602 bytes)

- `file_search` confirmed all 12 `.tsx` files and 3 `.ts` files (hooks, index barrels) exist in the worktree.

### CHANGES
- `frontend/src/hooks/useAuthForm.ts` — Created auth form state hook with isLoading/error/clearError/execute
- `frontend/src/pages/auth/LoginPage.tsx` — Created premium dark-themed login page with branding sidebar and form
- `frontend/src/pages/auth/RegisterPage.tsx` — Created registration page with validation and success state
- `frontend/src/pages/auth/ForgotPasswordPage.tsx` — Created forgot password page with email-sent confirmation
- `frontend/src/pages/auth/NotFoundPage.tsx` — Created minimal 404 page
- `frontend/src/pages/auth/index.ts` — Created barrel export for auth pages
- `frontend/src/pages/dashboard/DashboardPage.tsx` — Created dashboard placeholder with stat cards and empty state
- `frontend/src/pages/learning/LearningPage.tsx` — Created learning placeholder page
- `frontend/src/pages/analytics/AnalyticsPage.tsx` — Created analytics placeholder page
- `frontend/src/pages/resources/ResourcesPage.tsx` — Created resources placeholder page
- `frontend/src/pages/settings/SettingsPage.tsx` — Created settings page with profile and preferences cards
- `frontend/src/routes/ProtectedRoute.tsx` — Created auth guard component with loading state
- `frontend/src/routes/AppRoutes.tsx` — Created route configuration with public, protected, and 404 routes
- `frontend/src/routes/index.ts` — Created barrel export for routes
- `frontend/src/main.tsx` — Overwritten with provider stack (BrowserRouter, QueryClientProvider, AuthProvider, ToastProvider, AppRoutes)
